title.en: Ye Tian contributed the most, so he naturally g...

content.en:
Ye Tian contributed the most, so he naturally got the most distribution.

Although the other other shore-level geniuses were jealous, they didn't dare to say anything.

If it weren't for Ye Tian, they wouldn't even be eligible for the assignment, how could they dare to say anything!

Soon.

The resource treasure was distributed.

But.

The Lord of the Mystic did not distribute them all, and after they went out, he would give them the share of each of the other side level geniuses.

And then.

The Lord of Mystery collected the bones of those fallen geniuses and sealed them, along with the treasures on their bodies.

"Everyone, these fallen geniuses on the other side, the treasures on their bodies and the share that should have been obtained before, I will keep them, and after they go out, I will transfer them to their relatives or the forces where they belong. "

The Lord of Mystery said.

The consciousness of his words is obvious, that is, if you fall, the good things you should get will also be given to your families.

In this case, they will at least work harder.

"Lord of Mystery, there should be some other places in this Origin Bamboo Forest on the other side, we should continue to look for it. Ye Tian proposed.

"Well, that's for sure!"

The Lord of Mystery nodded.

In the following days, they searched for the Origin Bamboo Essence on the other side everywhere here, and the danger was not great, after all, the most dangerous place had passed.

Gradually, they found more and more of the Origin Bamboo Essence on the other side.

this day.

The entire Origin Bamboo Forest on the other side had been emptied by them, so they were ready to leave here.

......

"Lord of Mystery, where are we going next?"

A peer-level genius asked.

He was both expectant and worried.

After all, no one knows if the next place will be more dangerous, in that case, maybe the other side of the world will have to fall again.

"Go to the mountain range in front, our Xiao family's primordial-level genius found the Xuyang Stone there. "

The Lord of the Mysteries.

The Xuyang Stone can refine the Xuyang liquid, which can enhance the will of the Origin Realm, and is a well-deserved rare treasure.

These other shore-level geniuses naturally also wanted to improve the will of the Origin Realm, so they were still extremely eager for the Xuyang Stone.

"Let's go!"

More than a dozen other shore-level geniuses flew towards the mountain range they were heading to.

As soon as they approached this mountain range, the surrounding void began to distort, which showed the strength of the rules here.

"Be careful, there's danger here, too!"

The Lord of the Mysteries.

At this time.

Ye Tian walked in front, if there was really danger, with his strength, he should be able to withstand it, while other other geniuses might not be able to bear it.

And.

Ye Tian walked in front, and the other other shore-level heavens would feel much more at ease.

"This mountain range has a lot of passages, and there are many passages inside!"

Ye Tian said.

He attacked the mountain range, and found that the texture here was extremely tough, and the power of the attack would be diverted by the mountain range.

Therefore, it is impossible to destroy this mountain range.

But.

This treasure land has given birth to a lot of resources, and it is normal that this mountain range is special.

Whew!!!

One by one, the other side level geniuses entered the inner passage of the mountain range.

If there is a ruin stone, it will only be in the interior of the mountain range.

"The Stone will release the light of the Sun, and it should be easily recognizable. Even if it is covered by a special stone, as long as it is not too deep, it should seep out the light of the ruin sun!"

Subsequently.

More than a dozen geniuses at the other side of the world seriously searched for the Xuyang Stone.

Soon.

Then they saw a stone wall that revealed a faint light.

This light is the light of the sun!

"There is a ruin stone here, let's break it together!"

The Lord of Mystery said.

Thundered!!!!

A genius of the other side made a move, and the attack fell on the stone wall, although the power was transferred a lot, but the stone wall was still broken.

"Sure enough, there is a ruin stone!"

Ye Tian dug out a ruin stone.

And other other shore-level geniuses also dug up the Ruin Yang Stone.

In a short time, the ruin stone here was dug up.

The Lord of Xuan Miao collected these ruin stones, "There are a total of thirty-one ruin stones, it seems that there are a lot of ruin stones here!"

The Lord of Mystic is in a very good mood, after all, there are a lot of ruin stones here!

The other other Shore-level geniuses were also in a good mood, and they were naturally happy to have obtained so many Ruin Yang Stones so easily, and it seemed that there was no danger yet.

How nice it would be if it always did!

"Let's go, let's continue to look for the Xuyang Stone!"

The Lord of the Mysteries.

They left the place and continued to search for the Xuyang Stone.

Soon.

They found the second Ruin Yang Stone, and there were even more of them, a total of seventy-seven Ruyang Stones.

At this moment, every genius on the other side was excited, as if he had forgotten the danger.

However.

Ye Tian was still very calm, he was still vigilant.

He didn't believe there was any danger here, and maybe a terrifying creature would emerge at some point!

At this time.

His talent for copying is still scouting the surroundings.

But the stone wall here prevents the exploration of the copying talent, and the suppression of him here is very great, and the copying talent can't probe far at all.

Time passes.

In a short time, they had already found six ruin stones.

Abrupt.

They found a cave, and the entrance to the cave emitted a strong glow of the sun.

"There must be a lot of ruin stones in this cave!"

A genius of the other side level said excitedly.

Whew!!

One by one, the geniuses of the other side flew over, and the Lord of the Mystic also flew over.

Just after passing through the entrance of the cave, Ye Tian's face changed.

"Hurry back!"

The other other shore-level geniuses hadn't reacted yet, but Ye Tian's copying talent had already sighed at a terrifying creature.

The terrifying creature seemed to merge with the stone wall, but the copy talent was still perceived.

【Stone Python】

The next moment.

In the distance, the stone wall cracked, and a pair of huge pupils appeared.

The next moment.

The stone wall shook, and a huge ruin stone python appeared and rushed over.

"This ruin stone python is even more terrifying than the golden void bamboo bee!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Airplanes!!!!!

Gray light erupted from the eyes of the Stone Python.

This gray light was too fast, and Ye Tian could only use the amorphous bell to resist it.

Whoa!!!

The six other shore-level geniuses were hit by part of their bodies by the Stone Python.

And this part of the body immediately began to petrify.

The ability to petrify is very common, but being able to petrify nine Bone Transformation Realm other side level geniuses is not normal!
